description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a distinctive asymmetrical roof featuring multiple slopes and a skylight. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by large glass windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The structure sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with a paved entryway leading to the main entrance. A carport supported by slender columns extends from one side, providing covered parking. The front facade is marked by a prominent overhanging roof and a central glass door, while signage or display boards are positioned near the property boundary. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of functional and aesthetic elements typical of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with an asymmetrical sloped roof, large glass windows, and a carport, set on a green lawn with a paved entryway. The design features clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the overhanging roof, central entrance, and signage near the property edge.
description_view_1: Direct front-on view highlighting the main entrance, steps, and symmetrical roof overhang.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the carport with supporting columns and the extended roof section.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back wall, additional windows, and the continuation of the roof design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple sides
